{# contact_timeline.html — Activity timeline for a vendor contact. Receives: contact (VendorContact), activities (list[ActivityLog]), vendor_id (int). Called by: htmx_views.py contact_timeline route. Depends on: Tailwind CSS with brand palette. #}

Timeline — {{ contact.full_name or contact.email or 'Contact' }}

{% if activities %}
{% for a in activities %}
{% if a.activity_type == 'email_sent' or a.channel == 'email' %} {% elif a.activity_type == 'phone_call' or a.channel == 'phone' %} {% else %} {% endif %}

{{ a.activity_type|replace('_', ' ') }} {% if a.subject %} — {{ a.subject }}{% endif %}

{% if a.notes %}

{{ a.notes }}

{% endif %}
{{ a.created_at.strftime('%b %d %H:%M') if a.created_at else '' }}
{% endfor %}
{% else %}

No activity recorded for this contact.

{% endif %}
